# Each culture is reassigned to its own dialect for regional name variants.

# === TYPHREAN_ELVEN CULTURES ===

	color = rgb { 15 100 15 }
	tags = { wood_elf_gfx greek_gfx east_mediterranean_gfx mediterranean_gfx eastern_european_gfx european_gfx }

		elven_group
		typheraii_group
	}
}
